title: thisを指定して名前を整える

input.factory: () => ({ profile: { familyName: "山田", givenName: "太郎" }, separator: " ", formatName: function(separator) { return this.familyName + separator + this.givenName; } })
() => ({ profile: { familyName: "佐藤", givenName: "花子" }, separator: "・", formatName: function(separator) { return this.familyName + separator + this.givenName; } })
() => ({ profile: { familyName: "A", givenName: "B" }, separator: "", formatName: function(separator) { return this.familyName + separator + this.givenName; } })
() => ({ profile: { familyName: "Turing", givenName: "Alan" }, separator: ", ", formatName: function(separator) { return this.familyName + separator + this.givenName; } })
